title: Asani (disambiguation)
content:
'''Asani''' was a common [[Kushiban]] name. It was also a surname shared by two Humans:
*'''[[Evan Asani]]''', a Jedi who died in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].
*'''[[Wil Asani]]''', a member of the resistance group [[The Eleven]].
{{Disambig}}
